creator: maxim.konovalov@gmail.com
text:
> FreeBSD 8.2 is missing in the /usr/share/misc/bsd-family-tree
>
It is in HEAD but not in RELENG_8.  I need to MFC all changes back to
RELENG_8.

> >Fix:
> add FreeBSD 8.2 to the tree line, according to release
> information[1] it was released on the 24 of January 2011.
>
You look at the 'expected' column.  It was actually released on the 24
of February.

-- 
Maxim Konovalov
